scripts.build: bun run build:macos-helper && bun run --filter @agent-notify/core build && bun run --filter opencode-agent-notify build && bun run --filter agent-notify-cli build
scripts.build:binary: bun run build && bun build cli/src/index.ts --compile --outfile dist/agent-notify --target bun
scripts.build:binary:darwin:arm64: bun run build && bun build cli/src/index.ts --compile --outfile dist/agent-notify-darwin-arm64 --target bun-darwin-arm64
scripts.build:binary:darwin:x64: bun run build && bun build cli/src/index.ts --compile --outfile dist/agent-notify-darwin-x64 --target bun-darwin-x64
scripts.build:binary:linux:arm64: bun run build && bun build cli/src/index.ts --compile --outfile dist/agent-notify-linux-arm64 --target bun-linux-arm64
scripts.build:binary:linux:x64: bun run build && bun build cli/src/index.ts --compile --outfile dist/agent-notify-linux-x64 --target bun-linux-x64
scripts.build:binary:windows:x64: bun run build && bun build cli/src/index.ts --compile --outfile dist/agent-notify-windows-x64.exe --target bun-windows-x64
scripts.typecheck: bun run --filter @agent-notify/core build && bun run --workspaces typecheck
